Memory Problem, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
124 B3A B3A_CURNT_SEASON (B3A) Current Season CHAR 1 Cognitive patterns: memory/recall ability - current season. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
125 B3B B3B_LOC_OWN_ROOM (B3B) Location of Own Room CHAR 1 Cognitive patterns: memory/recall ability - location of own room. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
126 B3C B3C_STAFF (B3C) Staff Names/Faces CHAR 1 Cognitive patterns: memory/recall ability - staff names/faces. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-"
